claim: No Stable, release, complete conformance, package-parity, or publication claim is made.

semantics.nativeBasis: A fieldset and legend group two labelled native multiple selects with explicit directional move buttons and repeated hidden form values.
semantics.rolePolicy: Grouping, native selection, button names, membership, validation, disabled, and read-only state remain baseline; summary output is absent when disabled.

keyboard.behavior: Moves through source, move actions, and destination.
Moves selected enabled source/destination items without leaving the native list.

nonColor: Native selection, list position, directional button names, and text accompany color.
responsive: The dual-list layout becomes one column on narrow containers, retains visible collection counts, and uses logical properties for RTL.
consumerResponsibilities: Provide unique stable values and localized source/destination labels.
Do not claim Stable until all promotion evidence is current.
